query: 帮我查一下 AWP RootNet 上 subnet 12 的详细信息，我想看看它的 alpha token 价格和 skills URI，还有 coordinator URL 是什么
i want to stake 50000 AWP on rootnet, lock for 52 epochs, and allocate it all to my agent 0x742d35Cc6634C0532925a3b844Bc9e7595f2bD68 on subnet 7. walk me through the whole process
我刚注册了一个新的 subnet，id 是 15，现在想 activate 它，然后更新 metadata 把 skillsURI 改成我新的地址 ipfs://QmNewSkills123
can you show me the current AWP emission schedule? i want to see how much the daily rate decays over the next year and what epoch we're on right now
我要创建一个 signal proposal，内容是建议把 emission split 改成 60/40，用我的 position NFT #3 和 #7 的 voting power
帮我看下 0xABC123 这个地址的 staking 情况，包括 total staked、各个 position 的 lock 到期时间，还有 allocation 分配到了哪些 subnet
i need to vote FOR on proposal 88 using all my staked positions. make sure to handle the encoding correctly — i heard castVote doesn't work on this DAO
想要注册一个新的 AWP subnet，名字叫 AITrader，symbol 是 AIT，coordinator URL 是 https://aitrader.io/coord。帮我算一下 LP cost 要多少 AWP
show me all active subnets on AWP RootNet that have a skills URI published — i want to browse what's available for my agent to install
我想把 subnet 5 上分配给 agent A 的 3000 AWP 重新分配到 subnet 8 的 agent B，听说 reallocate 不用等 cooldown 是吗
帮我写一个 ERC-20 token 合约，要有 mint 和 burn 功能，用 OpenZeppelin 的库
i want to deploy a PancakeSwap V4 pool on BSC with custom tick spacing, can you help me set up the concentrated liquidity parameters?
can you check the ETH/USDT price on Uniswap right now? i need to decide whether to swap
帮我分析一下 BSC 上这个合约 0x1234abcd 的源码，看看有没有安全漏洞
i need help setting up a BSC validator node, what's the minimum BNB stake required and how do i configure the node client?
我想做一个 DeFi dashboard 前端，用 React 加 wagmi 来显示用户的 token balance 和交易历史
can you help me bridge my USDC from Ethereum to BSC using the official Binance bridge? need the cheapest route
帮我在 Hardhat 里写一个 Governor 合约的测试，要测试 propose、vote、execute 的完整流程
i want to set up a monitoring system for my BSC DeFi protocol — thinking of using TheGraph to index events and Grafana for dashboards
我的 MetaMask 连不上 BSC 网络了，chainId 56 对吗？RPC URL 应该填什么？
